name: Rashtrakuta Dynasty
region: Deccan (most of modern Maharashtra, Karnataka, AP, parts of north India)

rulers.name: Dhruva Dharavarsha
rulers.notes: First Rashtrakuta to win the tripartite struggle

rulers.name: Govinda III
rulers.notes: Greatest military success; defeated Palas and Pratiharas

rulers.name: Amoghavarsha I
rulers.notes: Patron of Jainism; author of Kavirajamarga (earliest Kannada poetics)

rulers.name: Indra IV
rulers.notes: Last; took sallekhana (Jain ritual fast unto death)

notable_achievements: Amoghavarsha's Kavirajamarga — first work in Kannada literature
Arab geographers ranked Rashtrakutas among "Four Great Kingdoms" of the world
